overview: TechMecha Torque IMS+CRM Version 2 — an enterprise-grade internal operations platform with full intern management, CRM pipeline, role-based access control, workflow automation, and advanced analytics built on the Internet Computer.
features: Role-based access control with 9 roles (Super Admin to Viewer) and permission matrix enforcement
6 automated workflows: overdue follow-up escalation, proposal expiry reminders, inactive lead detection, invoice overdue, SLA breach detection, reassignment on deactivation
Immutable audit logging for all system mutations with actor, action, before/after state
Approval queue for sensitive actions (delete, document send) requiring manager sign-off
Analytics upgrade: pipeline velocity, follow-up compliance rate, SLA breach rate, rep scorecards
User management admin console with CRUD, role assignment, space scoping, deactivation
Admin dashboard: audit log viewer, automation settings, approval queue, announcement management
Split-pane client preview (Space key), contextual right-click menus, bulk action bar
Inline editing for follow-up date, assigned member, and deal value on client table
Keyboard shortcuts: ? (shortcut panel), F (focus mode), L (quick activity), Ctrl+K (command palette)
Health score badge, stale deal badge, and SLA breach indicator on client cards
Multi-tab awareness banner when record is updated in another tab
Full IMS and CRM feature preservation from Version 1
